_comment: Copy the mcpServers block into your Claude Desktop config. On macOS this lives at ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json. Replace /ABS/PATH/TO/vcf2report with the absolute path to this repo. IMPORTANT: 'command' must point at the SAME Python interpreter where you ran 'pip install -e .[mcp]' (mcp[cli] + jinja2 must be importable there) — if you used a venv, set command to /ABS/PATH/TO/vcf2report/.venv/bin/python instead of a bare 'python3'. After editing, fully quit and reopen Claude Desktop.
